votes.rationale: motion-0117 closes the final governance gap in the Q2 normalization arc. motion-0111 now has the full 9-artifact canonical set: vote.json (PASS, 3 yes), verify.json (all_required_ok: true), policy.yaml (risk_score 0.01), decision.yaml (status: RATIFIED), and decision.md (RATIFIED header). Both required gates pass EXIT 0. The repair is clean, bounded to motion-0111 only, and .nexus/docs/motion-corpus-audit.md was not modified.

The repair evidence is inspectable: motion-0111/decision.yaml shows status: RATIFIED and ratified_by: unanimous_consent. All three missing artifacts are present with correct structure. The audit document at .nexus/docs/motion-corpus-audit.md is unchanged. All four P1/P2 normalization targets it identified have been independently verified as repaired (motions 0112–0114, 0116). No scope was widened.

The Q2 normalization arc is now fully closed. The audit baseline (motion-0111) is ratified. All four anomalies it named are repaired. The repo is at a clean pause baseline. motion-0117 is well-scoped, the implementation is verified, and the gates pass. Ratification is appropriate.
